metadata.purpose: Current research source index for Wave 13 architecture patterns.

sources.title: Procore Commitments User Guide
sources.useInArchitecture: Commitments, purchase orders, subcontracts, SOV, commitment status and current value.

sources.title: Procore Create a Commitment Change Order
sources.useInArchitecture: Commitment change orders, SOV lines, budget codes, and ERP/accounting acceptance boundary.

sources.title: BuildingConnected Bid Leveling Overview
sources.useInArchitecture: Bid leveling, proposals, apparent low, bid adjustments, notes, and award context.

sources.title: Procore Construction Procurement Log Template
sources.useInArchitecture: Lead time, order date, expected delivery, actual delivery, required-on-site date, and procurement/submittal linkage.

sources.title: CMiC Subcontract Management
sources.useInArchitecture: Subcontract SOV, bonding, insurance, lien waivers, and compliance requirements.

sources.title: CMiC Subcontract Schedule of Values
sources.useInArchitecture: SOV line cost-code/category associations and post/lock behavior.

sources.title: Kahua Construction Cost Management Software
sources.useInArchitecture: Budget-centric cost, commitments, change-order lifecycle visibility.

sources.title: Sage Intacct Construction
sources.useInArchitecture: Accounting/job-costing truth and committed/actual cost references.
